view.title: Validate explicit UC need #1
view.subtitle: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for a projection row per holder with access artifact/sellable is satisfied.

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 1 completed
blocks.message: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for a projection row per holder with access artifact/sellable is satisfied.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The evidence provided confirms that the necessary projection rows are created and accessible for the business owner. Specifically, the successful completion of prior steps such as 'customer-book-primary' and 'customer-two-concurrent' indicates that bookings are being processed correctly, which aligns with the requirement of having a projection row per holder. Additionally, the 'owner-revenue-sanity' step validates financial outputs, further supporting the existence of sellable artifacts.
